batch_objective: CRC Algorithm Designer — headless integration (keel-first). Adopt + harden the already-built parametric CRC keel (crc_kernel.py width-general 8-64 engine + crc_designer_model.py template/job/coverage model, 34 tests) and complete its run-path integration: E7 LUT fast-path in the kernel (perf, result-identical) and E8 on_gap_conflict enforcement helper (apply the gap_conflict safety policy). The Variant B TUI view is DEFERRED to batch-58. Requirements pre-written at docs/crc-algorithm-designer/01-requirements.md.
route: full /dev-flow (new engine surface + a safety-critical write-path policy). Branch claude/crc-algorithm-designer-8f82ae rebased onto origin/main tip f2109cf (RC-1 ff-merge clean; untracked keel preserved). Keel re-verified green on f2109cf: 119 CRC tests + frozen guard + ruff.
rc1: PASS @ f2109cf (2026-07-20). git fetch clean; branch was stale at a58d4e0 (batch-54 close) -> ff-merged onto origin/main f2109cf (batch-55 + post-55 fast-flows #104-108). Keel files untracked -> preserved by ff. ALREADY-SHIPPED check: no CRC Designer surface on origin/main (crc.py still the 32-bit-only shipped engine; crc_kernel/crc_designer_model are this batch's new additive modules) -> batch genuinely needed.

standing_authorization.operator_phrasing: AskUserQuestion 2026-07-20: Autonomy='Autonomo + self-merge'; Language='Ingles (default dev)'; Decision-recording='Si, registro completo'. Preceded by 'Arrancamos, adelante.'
standing_authorization.autonomy: end-to-end autonomous; agent self-approves every phase and increment gate with a named Coverage/Certainty/Evidence axis check
standing_authorization.merge_authority: GRANTED. Merge gated: green CI + a FINAL independent PR-level qa-reviewer pass over the whole diff vs main (dual traceability intact, 0 engine-frozen diffs, no cross-increment regression via C-26, every gate carry discharged). A HIGH finding BLOCKS the merge and returns to the operator. Snapshot regen (if any) = canonical-CI-only follow-up PR (local FORBIDDEN).
standing_authorization.decision_recording: FULL — every un-asked decision -> PLAN.md decision log + state.json.decisions_log + 05-postmortem + vault at sync

decisions_log.notes: CRC Algorithm Designer headless integration. Operator AskUserQuestion 2026-07-20 after 'Arrancamos, adelante'. RC-1: branch was stale @ a58d4e0 -> ff-merged onto origin/main f2109cf; keel (crc_kernel.py+crc_designer_model.py, 34 tests) preserved + re-verified green (119 CRC tests). SCOPE (autonomous): batch-57 = keel adoption + E7 LUT + E8 enforcement (headless); Variant B view -> batch-58; E6 up-converter -> batch-58. Design requirements pre-exist at docs/crc-algorithm-designer/01-requirements.md (adopted by this flow).

Streamlined (autonomous, recorded): design requirements adopted (Phase 1); rigor concentrated on an independent code-reviewer pass at the increment gate (Phase 2/3). Phase 3 = commit 1341fd3 (Inc-1 adopt keel / Inc-2 E7 LUT / Inc-3 E8 enforcement, 42 tests). code-reviewer: LUT proven byte-identical to crc_stream (all widths incl. odd, both refin/refout); enforcement correct; 1 HIGH F1 (parse_job crash on non-object 'algorithm') + F2/F3 -> all FIXED at gate (063bea5, +3 tests -> 45). Phase 4: pre-fix full suite 1730 passed/0 failed/3 xfailed/29 snapshots, exit 0 (23m26s); post-fix targeted 45 green; 0 engine-frozen diffs; frozen guards green. Post-fix full-suite = merge gate via CI. Axis met at every gate. Next: push + PR; on green CI run final independent qa-reviewer pass over whole diff vs main -> self-merge (HIGH blocks) -> /dev-flow-sync.
